nasb.text: Then Saul disguised himself by putting on other clothes, and went, he and two men with him, and they came to the woman by night; and he said, “Conjure up for me, please, and bring up for me whom I shall name to you.”

esv.text: So Saul disguised himself and put on other garments and went, he and two men with him. And they came to the woman by night. And he said, “Divine for me by a spirit and bring up for me whomever I shall name to you.”

cnv.text: 於是掃羅改裝易服，帶著兩個人與他一同去了。他們夜裡到了那女人那裡。掃羅說：“請你用交鬼的法術，把我所告訴你的那人為我招上來。”

ccb.text: 扫罗乔装打扮，由两个人陪同乘夜赶到那妇人家里，说：“请你用法术把我要求问的亡灵招上来吧。”
